# pause()

**Instance Method**

Pauses all audio playback.

## Declaration

```swift
func pause()
```

## Discussion

To resume paused playback, call [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/start()].

## Controlling and Inspecting Playback State

- **start()**: Starts or resumes all audio playback.
- **stop()**: Stops all audio playback.
- **update()**: Processes app commands and increments framework processing.
- **renderingState**: The status of the engine’s audio playback.
- **lastRenderTime**
